subject: Fermi GBM trigger 570825115/190202772 is not a GRB
body:
S. Poolakkil (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 570825115/190202772
at 18:31:50.45 UT on 2 February 2019, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to MAXI J1348-630."
